     QUICK GUIDE

    How to use Version 16

    1. Choose a scene from the left.
    2. Set shutter speed, aperture and ISO.
    3. Choose autofocus mode and place the focus point.
    4. Press AF or AF-ON to focus.
    5. Take the photograph and review the instructor score.

      PRACTICAL EXAM

      Camera Control Assessment

      Complete three unseen challenges. Your final result combines exposure, focus, motion and composition.

      Attempts0 Best result— CertificateLocked
      EXAM CRITERIA
      • Average technical score of 75% or above
      • No critical focus failures
      • Correct settings for at least two scenes
      • Complete all three challenges

            Backend-ready design

            This version uses an on-device rules engine. A secure AI API can later replace it without changing the interface.

            Real-camera control deck

            Use intelligent camera modes, save a setup and practise half-press autofocus before taking the photograph.

            Quick assignments

            Load a sensible starting setup, then refine it using the camera dials.

            Half-press locks focus and meters the scene. Full press records the shot.
